prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约4453名→3353名→4084名→3982名→3039名，整体波动较大；2025年位次较2024年前移约943名，创近五年最佳，显示报考热度回升明显；该校在广东省物理类招生计划：2021年99人、2022年99人、2023年101人、2024年100人、2025年99人；2026年计划大幅扩招至155人，较2025年增加约56.6%，扩招幅度显著，将明显拉低录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第3名（2021–2026年均为第3），属全国顶尖高校层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风、校园安全等事件，但整体关注度有限；抖音热度总排名第14（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；近年未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达35个，代表性学科包括：计算机科学与技术A+、软件工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、光学工程A+、动力工程及工程热物理A+、临床医学A、法学A等，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力持续。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与浙大优势学科高度匹配；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争略有加剧，2025年物理类本科批436分，近年波动不大；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，非广东省本地高校；广东省考生对省外顶尖985高校报考意愿较强，地域因素对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移反映的热度回升、2026年计划扩招56.6%带来的位次后移压力、以及本省考生增加3.6%的竞争加剧，扩招是主导因素但热度回升有对冲作用；预测2026年物理类最低位次约4021名，区间3563–4479名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 4453 → 3353 → 4084 → 3982 → 3039, showing significant fluctuations; in 2025, the ranking moved forward by about 943 places compared to 2024, achieving the best in five years, indicating a clear rebound in application popularity; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Guangdong Province: 99 in 2021, 99 in 2022, 101 in 2023, 100 in 2024, 99 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 155, an increase of about 56.6% over 2025, a substantial expansion that will notably lower admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (3rd from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety, but overall attention is limited; Douyin popularity ranks 14th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; no obvious admission gaps in recent years; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 35 disciplines rated A- or above, representative disciplines include: Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Clinical Medicine A, Law A, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Zhejiang University's advantageous disciplines; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 436 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, not a local university in Guangdong Province; Guangdong candidates have a strong willingness to apply to top 985 universities outside the province, with regional factors having a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward movement of the 2025 ranking reflecting a rebound in popularity, the pressure of ranking backward due to the 56.6% expansion in the 2026 plan, and the intensified competition from a 3.6% increase in local candidates, expansion is the dominant factor but the popularity rebound has a counteracting effect; predict the minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category to be about 4021, with a range of 3563–4479.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 241 → 265 → 303 → 280 → 271, fluctuating narrowly within the 240–310 range, stabilizing around 270–280 in recent years, with a 2025 baseline of about 271. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong: 2021: 38, 2022: 38, 2023: 38, 2024: 38, 2025: 40; 2026 plan: 38, a decrease of 2 (5% reduction) from 2025, a relatively small reduction with limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving incidents such as academic misconduct and campus safety, but overall attention is limited. Douyin heat ranking: 14th overall (high heat), with large short video exposure and relatively high application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 35 disciplines were rated A- or above, with relevant advantageous disciplines for History Category including: Foreign Language and Literature A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Law A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Journalism and Communication A-, etc., demonstrating top-tier strength in liberal arts as well.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are socially popular and recommended, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The 2025 History Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 464 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, not a local university in Guangdong. Guangdong examinees have a strong willingness to apply to top-tier 985 universities outside the province, with regional factors having a neutral impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 271, the slight 5% enrollment reduction in 2026 exerting upward pressure on rankings, and the 11.6% increase in local History Category examinees intensifying competition, the combination of enrollment reduction and increased examinees pushes rankings upward. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for History Category is approximately 243, with a range of 215–271.
